title: Fleet (disambiguation)
content:
'''Fleet''' can refer to:
{{IncompleteList|oou="oou"}}
*A '''[[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]''' of [[Starship/Legends|starships]]
*'''[[Sector Fleet]]'''
*'''[[Carth Onasi|Fleet]]''', a nickname of Carth Onasi during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]
*'''[[Black Fleet]]'''
*'''[[Black Fleet Crisis]]'''
*'''[[Corellian fleet (Great Sith War)]]'''
*'''[[Corellian Home Fleet]]'''
*'''[[Imperial Naval Academy]]''', also known as '''Prefsbelt Fleet Camp'''
*'''[[New Republic Fleet Academy]]'''
*'''[[The Black Fleet Crisis]]'''
